summary: Rut Page redesign testing completed. Backend API and Frontend UI tests all passed. The Rut tab now displays route customers with proper pending/visited sections, summary bar, and detail drawer.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with date mocking for Monday route
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rut page redesign tested successfully. Key findings: 1) Today (Saturday) has no route data, so UI shows 0 points with empty state messages. 2) Monday route has 2 customers - 1 pending (Musteri B - Restoran) and 1 visited (AILEM MARKET GURBET DURMUS). 3) Detail drawer works for both pending and visited items. 4) Visit order sorting is preserved (not dynamically reordered). 5) All data-testid attributes are properly implemented.

backend_tests.data_structure: Customer data has required fields: id, name, route_plan.days, order_status
backend_tests.lowercase_day: API handles lowercase day codes (mon -> MON)

frontend_tests.rut_tab_navigation: Rut tab clickable and navigates correctly
frontend_tests.sidebar_active_state: Rut nav item has orange background when active

page_structure.title: Bugünün Noktaları
page_structure.subtitle: Shows date + point count (e.g., '17 Mart Pazartesi - 2 nokta')
page_structure.summary_bar: Orange pending section + Green visited section
page_structure.pending_section: White card with orange accent, shows pending customers
page_structure.visited_section: White card with green accent, shows visited customers

detail_drawer.opens_on_click: Yes - both pending and visited items
detail_drawer.status_badge: Orange for pending, Green for visited

empty_state.saturday_no_data: Shows '0 nokta' with empty messages in both sections

sorting.no_dynamic_reorder: Order preserved as per route sequence

design_verification.sidebar: Active Rut item with orange background
design_verification.header: Search input, notification bell, user avatar all present
design_verification.cards: White background, rounded corners (rounded-[26px]), soft shadows
design_verification.colors: Orange (#f97316) for pending, Emerald (#10b981) for visited
design_verification.typography: Title 4xl bold, subtitle base text with calendar icon
